description: A customer wants to rent a mid-size SUV for 3 days from an airport location.

nodes.task_description: Search for available mid-size SUVs at the specified airport location for the given dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds several mid-size SUVs available.

nodes.task_description: Present the options and their prices, including any insurance add-ons.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the vehicle options and total costs.

nodes.task_description: Book the selected vehicle and provide the customer with a reservation number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully completes the car rental booking.
